summary: Leading design for merchant onboarding and risk. Built the Blitz design system now used across 6 product surfaces.
Owned end-to-end design for credit card management. Shipped features touching 4M+ MAUs.
Enterprise banking flows. Cut onboarding drop-off from 41% to 17% through research-led iteration.
First real design job. Learned how systems, patterns, and constraints compose good products.
